steps.assistant_text: Decompiled as 42-insn dual-state-bracket helper with 2 trailing bundled bytes for successor-stolen $f0=1.0f setup. Key technique: 8 unique externs (D_titproc_BB8_a..h all aliased to 0x00000000) to break IDO's CSE which would otherwise promote &D_00000000 to $s0; without unique externs build CSE'd to 1 lui+addiu pair reused via $s0 across all 8 sites, regressing to 26.96%. With unique externs IDO emits fresh lui+addiu/lw pair per site matching target's 8 R_MIPS_HI16/LO16 reloc pairs. Asymmetric inner D[0] gates: first inner runs when D[0]!=0 (beq t6,zero,skip), second when D[0]==0 (bnel t7,zero,epilog with annulled lw ra in delay).

metadata.verification: Verified byte-for-byte (44/44 words match) via objdiff report.json. SUFFIX_BYTES recipe injects 0x3C013F80,0x44810000 (lui at, 0x3F80; mtc1 at, $f0) for the bundled successor-stolen prologue.
